commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=54da22cbd42a4af51e9127919acf9596f7642b3c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds async credential/config resolution helpers and switches selected auth storage and CLI auth epoch paths away from synchronous file or shell reads.

PR surface: Source +400. Total +400 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main still contains synchronous macOS keychain child-process reads plus synchronous auth/config reads in reachable auth-provider code. A live current-main Gateway/Telegram stall reproduction was not run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review remains needed because the PR has blocking correctness findings and missing contributor-supplied real behavior proof.

target.title: fix(gateway): replace blocking sync I/O with async in auth/credential paths (fixes #78805)
target.body:
## Summary

- Replace `execSync` calls for macOS Keychain access (`security find-generic-password`) with `promisify(exec)` to prevent event loop blocking
- Add async variants of credential readers: `readClaudeCliCredentialsCachedAsync`, `readCodexCliCredentialsCachedAsync`, `readClaudeCliCredentialsAsync`, `readCodexCliCredentialsAsync`
- Update `cli-auth-epoch` to use async credential readers via `getLocalCliCredentialFingerprintAsync` (detects test overrides for backward compat)
- Replace `readFileSync` with `fs.promises.readFile` in `auth-storage.ts` `withLockAsync` path
- Add async `resolveConfigValueAsync` and related async variants to avoid blocking on shell-command resolution

## Root Cause

The sync `execSync("security find-generic-password")` calls in `cli-credentials.ts` for macOS keychain access could block the Node.js event loop for 4+ seconds during credential reads. Combined with `readFileSync` in `auth-storage.ts` lock paths and `execSync` in `resolve-config-value.ts` for shell command resolution, these blocking calls caused:
- WebSocket timeouts (Telegram channels)
- Infinite pending states
- Duplicate message sends

The fix adds async versions of all affected credential/auth/config resolution functions using `promisify(exec)` and `fs.promises.readFile`, allowing the event loop to remain responsive during I/O operations.

## Verification

- All existing tests pass (35 tests in cli-auth-epoch, 16 in cli-credentials, 2 in auth-storage)
- Backward compatible: existing sync APIs preserved; async variants added alongside
- Test dep injection handled: `resolveCliAuthEpoch` auto-detects when only sync deps are overridden and falls back for backward compatibility

Fixes #78805
target.author: mazhuima
